headline: A Look At Targa Resources (TRGP) Valuation After Strong Q4 Results And Higher Dividend Outlook
summary: Targa Resources (TRGP) has drawn fresh investor attention after several major firms updated their views following strong fourth quarter results, expanded Permian growth plans, and a higher common dividend for 2026. See our latest analysis for Targa Resources. The recent earnings beat, higher 2026 dividend guidance, ongoing buybacks, and fresh senior notes issuance sit alongside sharp momentum, with a 30 day share price return of 17.33% and a three year total shareholder return above 200%...
